props.ChoiceText: Fields, rights of passage, and old memory all had to be turned into one answer after someone moved the markers and made the land itself look partisan.
props.ChoiceBio: Moved estate markers taught you that land remembers arguments longer than men do.

0.TargetText: A tenant, surveyor, or local notable still remembers where you drew the line.
0.TransitionText: Because a boundary dispute taught you that land remembers arguments longer than men do, household authority remained your daily craft.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Steward, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because a boundary dispute taught you that land remembers arguments longer than men do, estate management could widen into civic judgment and public office.
1.TransitionPrompt: This dispute could carry you into civic office as a magistrate, but you may remain a steward instead.

2.TransitionText: Because a boundary dispute taught you that land remembers arguments longer than men do, household authority remained your daily craft.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Steward, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TargetText: Someone local still trusts you to settle what maps and memory cannot.
